race.description: Max Blackiston – Life Member Mdn Plate
race.comment: COLIZZI (3) returned last time with a solid third at Geelong over 1700m. Should come on from that effort and sets up for every chance from the inside gate. TAGALAON (9) wound up strongly but just failed to pick up the winner last start over 1600m at Pakenham. Should be ready to peak now and has claims. PARI MOI (12) showed good early dash last time out and led for most of the way before being claimed and finishing a nose away in second over 1700m at Geelong. Maps for every hope and should be right there. ROYAL MAXIMUS (8) has shown some ability in three runs to date and up in trip now should suit nicely for the Waller yard.
